core_principle.statement: Images are engineering documentation outputs, not aesthetic or marketing visuals.
core_principle.interpretation: Every image must represent architectural systems, execution logic, or industrial reality.

visual_identity_philosophy.goal: Communicate architectural systems as real, buildable, and measurable structures
visual_identity_philosophy.anti_style: Reject lifestyle, luxury, and decorative visual language

primary_image_style.purpose: Show real execution of architectural ceiling systems

composition_rules.focus: Structural system clarity, not aesthetic composition
composition_rules.alignment: Strong preference for grid-based and modular composition
composition_rules.depth: Functional depth only (no cinematic blur effects)

subject_rules.human_presence: Only functional roles allowed (engineers, installers, technicians)

visual_language_rules.geometry: Strong linear and modular structure must dominate
visual_language_rules.symmetry: Engineering symmetry preferred over artistic composition
visual_language_rules.repetition: System patterns encouraged to show modular architecture

viewer_perception: This is a real engineering company
This system is buildable and functional
This is not decoration, it is execution

strategic_goal.objective: Ensure all visual outputs represent real architectural engineering systems
strategic_goal.outcome: Strong perception of AvizSazeh as a technical execution-focused engineering brand
